title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 77.290 - Mayor shall communicate to the council, what
text:
77.290.  Mayor shall communicate to the council, what. — The mayor shall, from time to time, communicate to the council such measures as may, in his opinion, tend to the improvement of the finances, the police, health, security, ornament, comfort and general prosperity of the city.
(RSMo 1939 § 6873) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6727; 1919 § 8214; 1909 § 9151
